# Final Prime

> Public systems, works, research, game reviews, and analysis by Daniel Kenessy. This file is a navigation aid, not a grant of access, reuse, training, or other rights.

## Primary routes

- [Final Prime](https://final-prime.github.io/): Public overview and current release state.
- [Systems](https://final-prime.github.io/systems/): Public systems index and disclosure boundaries.
- [A/SYNC](https://final-prime.github.io/systems/async/): FP-SYS-0003, a prototype coordination-system concept with a controlled public model and explicit evidence limits.
- [Works](https://final-prime.github.io/works/): Public works, operational research, reviews, evidence dossiers, and release-lane index.
- [REALOPS-01 Agent Roster](https://final-prime.github.io/works/realops-01/): FP-WRK-0001, a frozen operational routing pilot across four single-agent profiles and 40 matched missions.
- [The Reliability Frontier](https://final-prime.github.io/works/realops-03/): FP-WRK-0002 / REALOPS-03, a 500-mission field test across five AI agent profiles with deterministic grades and a blind secondary audit.
- [Theory](https://final-prime.github.io/thought/): Declared philosophy, essay, and video-analysis lanes; currently no published object.
- [Game reviews](https://final-prime.github.io/reviews/): Works-classified review methodology, registry, and published dossiers.
- [Metro 2033 Redux review](https://final-prime.github.io/reviews/metro-2033-redux/): FP-REV-0001, a scored long-form review dossier.
- [Public index](https://final-prime.github.io/index/): Route-level public object inventory.
- [Contact](https://final-prime.github.io/contact/): Direct questions, rights and security reports, plus the private-work disclosure boundary.
- [Legal and IP](https://final-prime.github.io/legal/): Ownership, trademark, copyright, reuse, and permission boundaries.

## Scope

Only the routes listed above are represented as public content. Private research, unpublished materials, credentials, personal data, and trade secrets are outside this public surface. The legal and IP page controls where any summary conflicts with a rights notice.
